name: firewall-policy-converter
description: Professional firewall configuration conversion tool — PAN-OS to Juniper SRX

scripts.build:standalone: vite build --config vite.standalone.config.js && sed 's|\.\./assets/|./assets/|g' dist-standalone/standalone/index.html > dist-standalone/index.html && rm -rf dist-standalone/standalone && cp standalone/README.txt dist-standalone/
scripts.zip:standalone: npm run build:standalone && cd dist-standalone && zip -r ../firewall-policy-converter-standalone.zip . -x 'prompts/*' && cd ..
